description_long: This is a tall, utilitarian street light featuring a slender, metallic pole with a single, angled arm extending outward to support a modern lamp head. The lamp head is streamlined and slightly curved, designed to cast light downward over a roadway or sidewalk. Midway up the pole, there is a blue and red Interstate 91 shield sign, indicating its placement along a major highway or urban thoroughfare. The base of the pole is robust and squared, likely for stability and secure ground anchoring. The pole itself is plain, with no decorative elements, and the overall design prioritizes function and visibility. The materials appear to be primarily metal, with a glass or plastic cover over the lamp, and the sign is likely made of metal with a painted or printed finish.
description: A tall, plain metal street light with a single angled arm and a modern lamp head, featuring an Interstate 91 sign attached to the pole. The design is functional and suited for highways or urban streets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full pole, lamp arm extending to the left, and the Interstate 91 sign clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the pole and lamp arm seen edge-on, making the lamp head and sign appear very thin.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lamp arm extending to the right and the back of the sign partially visible, showing the plain back of the pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the pole and lamp arm seen edge-on, lamp head and sign are barely visible.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined, and slightly curved lamp head with a flat underside and a clear cover, designed for efficient downward light distribution. No decorative elements or diffusers are visible.
